name: Vercel
one_liner: Vercel is a frontend cloud / deployment platform whose REST API lets agents manage deployments, projects, domains, DNS, environment variables, teams, and webhooks.
primary_auth: Personal access token (Bearer token) created in account settings; OAuth2 used for building marketplace Integrations.
access_notes: Any Vercel account (including the free Hobby plan) can create an Access Token from Account Settings > Tokens and immediately call the API with 'Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>'. No payment or human approval needed for basic API use.
api_notes: Well-documented REST API over https://api.vercel.com (HTTP/1 & HTTP/2, versioned endpoints like v6/deployments). Broad coverage: deployments, projects, domains, DNS records, environment variables, teams/members, access groups, edge config, aliases, certs, logs/log drains, webhooks, integrations, and auth tokens (100+ operations). Official TypeScript/Go/Python SDKs also provided. Team-scoped resources require a teamId query param. Rate limits exposed via X-RateLimit-* headers.
mcp_notes: Vercel ships an official remote MCP server at https://mcp.vercel.com (Public Beta, announced on the Vercel blog/changelog). OAuth-based, read-only at launch, with an allowlist of approved clients (Claude, Cursor, VS Code). Tools cover searching docs and managing/inspecting teams, projects, and deployments. Add via: claude mcp add --transport http vercel https://mcp.vercel.com.
main_blocker: None significant. Public REST API with instant free self-serve tokens; only friction is team-scoped resources needing an explicit teamId parameter.

evidence.claim: Vercel Access Tokens authenticate the API via 'Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>'; REST over https://api.vercel.com with X-RateLimit-* headers and teamId scoping.
Endpoint to create an auth token exists in the REST API reference under authentication.
Webhooks are a first-class REST resource (GET https://api.vercel.com/v1/webhooks/{id}) with signature verification.
Vercel ships an official MCP server at mcp.vercel.com, OAuth-based and read-only in Public Beta, supporting Claude/Cursor/VS Code.
Vercel announced its official MCP now in Public Beta.

open_questions: Exact API rate-limit ceilings per plan tier; whether the official MCP will add write operations beyond the read-only beta.
